June 2026 — Trip Calendar

Florence · Naples · Puglia

planning
overview
Sunday Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday Saturday
1 2 3 4 5 ✈️ Day 1 — Depart MSN→ORD→Frankfurt
LH 8835 + LH 0433
Departs ORD 10:30pm		 6 ✈️ Day 2 — Arrive Florence FRA→FLR (LH 9498)
Land Florence 6:30pm
First night in Italy
7 🏛 Day 3 — Florence Duomo dome climb
Uffizi Gallery
Ponte Vecchio		 8 🏛 Day 4 — Florence Accademia — David
Medici Chapels
Mercato Centrale		 9 🏛 Day 5 — Florence Bargello Museum
Santa Croce
Local neighborhoods		 10 🚄 Day 6 — Train South Italo #8902 (PIDCMA)
Departs FLR 12:28pm
Arrives Naples 3:28pm		 11 🏺 Day 7 — Naples Herculaneum ruins
Ancient Roman city
MANN Museum option		 12 🏺 Day 8 — Naples MANN Museum
Cappella Sansevero
Spaccanapoli		 13 ✈️ Day 9 — Fly to Puglia AZ 1270: NAP→FCO 3:05pm
AZ 1623: FCO→BDS 5:15pm
Arrive Brindisi 6:25pm
14 🫒 Day 10 — Brindisi First full Puglia day
Harbor walk
Colonne Romane		 15 🫒 Day 11 — Puglia Tour Day 1
(details TBD)		 16 🫒 Day 12 — Puglia Tour Day 2
(details TBD)		 17 🫒 Day 13 — Puglia Tour Day 3
(details TBD)		 18 🫒 Day 14 — Puglia Tour Day 4
(details TBD)		 19 🫒 Day 15 — Puglia Tour Day 5
Pack for departure		 20 ✈️ Day 16 — Fly Home BDS→MUC 10:55am
MUC→ORD 3:40pm
ORD→MSN 9:15pm
21 🏠 Home Arrived ~10:30pm last night 22 23 24 25 26 27
28 29 30
Legend: ✈️ Flight Day 🚄 Train Day 🏛 Florence 🏺 Naples 🫒 Puglia Home
TipPrinting This Calendar

Use File → Print (Ctrl+P / Cmd+P). The navigation and sidebar hide automatically. For best results, select Landscape orientation.

Reservations in Hand

What Code Date
Outbound flights (Lufthansa) FMWYOJ Jun 5–6
Return flights (Lufthansa/United) FMWYOJ Jun 20
Italo train Florence → Naples PIDCMA Jun 10
ITA flights Naples → Brindisi via Rome IXYZMT Jun 13
